title: GGB-pack [MTR]
description: This pack adds mountain train from Gornergrat Bahn.
body:
This pack adds trains from Gornergrat Bahn.

**THIS RP WAS MODELED IN MC VANILLA STYLE ([MVP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/matoi-vanilla-pack-ir)/TEXELS)**

The trains are formed of 2 coaches. There are regular ones and rotated ones for systems with platforms situated on the other side. 

You can form any railway track you want, just by mixing ABT_rail with other models.

There is also a special catenary. Additional wires are not recomended to use in sharp curves because the big gaps/intersections appear.

Recommended radius of curves is >60 blocks.
